# pfsense_wake_on_lan_entries (Data Source)

Retrieves all Wake-on-LAN entries from pfSense.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "pfsense_wake_on_lan_entries" "all" {}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `entries` (List of Object) List of Wake-on-LAN entries. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--entries))

<a id="nestedatt--entries"></a>
### Nested Schema for `entries`

Read-Only:

- `description` (String) Description of the Wake-on-LAN entry.
- `interface` (String) Network interface for the Wake-on-LAN entry (e.g. 'lan', 'opt1').
- `mac` (String) MAC address of the device to wake.
